Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement And Have Case Placed Back On Active Calendar; Declaration Of Emily D. Pierce
Off Calendar Jan-20-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance is made in this matter.

PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATED, LLC's Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement And Have Case Placed Back On Active Calendar is Off calendar. Plaintiff did not file the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: proceeding not reported.
